name: 60-Day Past-Customer Reactivate
description: Monthly, it pulls up customers you have not worked with in a couple of months and drafts a note to win the next job. The easiest sale is often the person who already paid you once.
prompt_template: Find past customers I have not done work for in about 60 days or more. For each one, draft a warm note that reminds them what we did together, mentions something relevant we could help with next, and makes it easy to start a conversation. Use what you know about each customer so it does not feel generic. Hand me the drafts to approve before sending.
